subject: Non-OpenSSL TLS libraries
truth: Stop using urllib3 with LibreSSL or wolfSSL; only OpenSSL is supported.
quote: Support for non-OpenSSL TLS libraries (LibreSSL, wolfSSL) is removed.

subject: Old OpenSSL versions
truth: Stop using urllib3 with OpenSSL older than 1.1.1; OpenSSL 1.1.1 or later is required.
quote: Support for OpenSSL versions older than 1.1.1 is removed.

subject: Python versions
truth: Stop using urllib3 on Python 2.7 or Python 3.5–3.9; Python 3.10 or later is required.
quote: Support for Python 2.7 and Python 3.5–3.9 is removed; Python 3.10 or later is required.

subject: Non-CPython/PyPy3 implementations
truth: Stop using urllib3 on Google App Engine or Jython; only CPython and PyPy3 are supported.
quote: Support for non-CPython/PyPy3 implementations (Google App Engine, Jython) is removed.

subject: urllib3.contrib.ntlmpool module
truth: Stop importing urllib3.contrib.ntlmpool; it has been removed.

subject: urllib3.contrib.securetransport module
truth: Stop importing urllib3.contrib.securetransport; it has been removed.

subject: urllib3[secure] extra
truth: Stop using pip install urllib3[secure]; that extra has been removed.

subject: HTTPResponse.strict attribute and strict parameter
truth: Stop accessing HTTPResponse.strict or passing the strict parameter; both are removed.
quote: The `HTTPResponse.strict` attribute and the `strict` parameter are removed (unneeded on Python 3).

subject: VerifiedHTTPSConnection import path
truth: Stop importing VerifiedHTTPSConnection from urllib3.connectionpool; use HTTPSConnection from urllib3.connection instead.
quote: `VerifiedHTTPSConnection` is no longer importable from `urllib3.connectionpool`; use `HTTPSConnection` from `urllib3.connection`.

subject: Default minimum TLS version
truth: The default minimum TLS version is now TLS 1.2 instead of TLS 1.0; connections to servers requiring TLS 1.0 or 1.1 will fail.
quote: The default minimum TLS version changed from TLS 1.0 to TLS 1.2.

subject: Default request body encoding
truth: The default request body encoding is now UTF-8 instead of ISO-8859-1; non-UTF-8 byte sequences may cause errors or be misinterpreted.
quote: The default request body encoding changed from ISO-8859-1 to UTF-8.

subject: Certificate hostname verification via commonName
truth: Stop relying on commonName for certificate hostname verification; only subjectAltName is used, so certificates without SAN will fail verification.
quote: Certificate hostname verification via `commonName` is removed; only `subjectAltName` is used.

subject: Default TLS cipher set
truth: urllib3 no longer sets a default cipher list; it uses the system-configured ciphers, which may change which servers are connectable.
quote: The default set of TLS ciphers is removed; urllib3 now uses the system-configured cipher list.

subject: URLs without a scheme
old: URLs without a scheme (e.g. 'example.com/path') were accepted
new: URLs without a scheme are deprecated and will raise errors in a future version
truth: Stop passing URLs without a scheme to urllib3; they are deprecated and will raise errors in a future version.
quote: URLs without a scheme are deprecated and will raise errors in a future version.

from_fact: urls without a scheme (e.g. 'example.com/path') were accepted
urls without a scheme are deprecated and will raise errors in a future version
